hero.name: shwarzdev
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.description: I build web apps, Telegram bots, AI tools, and everything in between. If it can be coded, I probably build it.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: Full-stack developer with 2+ years of experience building web applications, AI integrations, Telegram bots and Mini Apps, REST APIs, and SaaS products. I work across the entire stack — from React frontends to Python/Node backends with PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker deployments.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of things I've built
projects.sonoria_desc: Full music streaming platform as a Telegram Mini App. Three panels: app, admin dashboard, advertiser cabinet. Ad system with targeting, Premium via Telegram Stars, PWA + APK. 13 languages. Built solo from scratch.
projects.fortune_desc: Viral marketing Telegram bot with Mini App. Users spin a fortune wheel to win real coupons, invite friends via referrals, create mirror bots. Full admin panel with coupon management and push notifications.
projects.livechat_desc: Real-time chat application with AI bot. Multiple rooms, online presence, typing indicators. Mention @ai to get instant responses powered by Groq.
projects.quill_desc: Writing assistant SaaS. AI-powered rewriting, expanding, summarizing. Auth with email + GitHub OAuth, credit system, auto-save.
projects.ecommerce_desc: Production-ready REST API with JWT auth, role-based access, products, orders, stock management, search with filters. Docker Compose ready.
projects.doc_assistant_desc: Chat with PDF/DOCX/TXT files. RAG pipeline with vector embeddings, semantic search, answers with page citations.
projects.snip_desc: SaaS URL shortener with dashboard and click analytics. GitHub OAuth authentication, link management.
projects.shopify_desc: Real-time order notifications, low stock alerts, daily sales reports from Shopify. Auto webhook registration.
projects.expense_desc: Telegram bot that tracks expenses via natural language. GPT parses messages like 'spent 40 on dinner' into categorized records.
projects.crypto_desc: Telegram bot for crypto price tracking. Set target price alerts, portfolio tracker. Checks every 60 seconds via CoinGecko API.
projects.support_desc: Customer support chatbot using embeddings + cosine similarity. Reads FAQ from text files, logs unanswered queries.
projects.price_desc: Monitors product prices on websites via CSS selectors. Sends Telegram alerts when price drops. History tracking.
projects.budget_desc: Budget tracker as a Telegram Mini App. Expense categories, per-user data, web UI running inside Telegram.
projects.clipper_desc: Chrome/Edge browser extension. Clip selected text or full pages directly to Telegram via context menu.
projects.workflow_desc: Watches folders for CSV/Excel files, parses with pandas, sends summary stats to Telegram. Auto-archive.
projects.landing_ai_saas_desc: Landing page for an AI writing assistant. Hero with product mockup, features grid, pricing, testimonials. Fully responsive.
projects.landing_crypto_desc: Dark fintech landing with canvas particle background, live market table, animated stats. Made for a crypto trading platform.
projects.landing_ecommerce_desc: Premium streetwear e-commerce landing with product cards, wishlist, cart badge. Minimalist black and white aesthetic.
projects.landing_fitness_desc: Mobile fitness app landing with CSS phone mockup, workout cards, stats, progress charts. Fiery orange and black theme.
projects.landing_food_desc: Food delivery landing with CSS scooter illustration, draggable restaurant cards, category filters. Warm orange and cream palette.
projects.landing_agency_desc: Creative agency landing. Minimal black and white with custom cursor, smooth scroll animations, acid green accent.

testimonials.heading: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: What clients say about working with me
testimonials.t1_text: Built our Telegram bot with fortune wheel Mini App from scratch in under a week. Admin panel, coupon system, referrals, mirror bots, everything works. Great communication, always available and responsive.
testimonials.t2_text: Needed Shopify integration with Telegram for order notifications and daily sales reports. Delivered exactly what I asked for, clean code, well documented. Even added features I didn't think of. Highly recommend.
testimonials.t3_text: Ordered a landing page for our AI product. Result exceeded expectations, modern design, fast loading, fully responsive. Understood the brief immediately and delivered ahead of schedule.
testimonials.t4_text: Ordered an internal dashboard with REST API and PostgreSQL. Professional approach, solid architecture decisions, database design was spot on. Project delivered on time and on budget.

contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Got a project in mind? I'm open to freelance work, contract positions, and interesting collaborations.
